options.name: Disable Spinning
options.desc: Removes spinning of objects like orbs and saws. May improve performance by up to 20% depending on the level.

options.name: Disable Particles
options.desc: Disables the use of the particle engine. May improve performance.

options.name: Hide Pause Button
options.desc: Hides the pause button at the top right when playing.

options.name: Legacy Pads Logic
options.desc: Brings back the old code for pads. Recommended when speedrunning.

options.name: Speedrun Timer
options.desc: Adds a timer in the top left.

options.name: FPS Counter
options.desc: Adds an FPS counter in the bottom right.

options.name: Hide Master Mode Vignette
options.desc: Hides the red vignette when playing in master mode.

options.name: Fullscreen Mode
options.desc: Changes the screen mode, windowed or fullscreen. Also chooses the default mode on launch.

options.name: Compressed Music
options.desc: Uses the original lower quality music files to save memory and decrease delays.

options.name: Macro Overlay Hotkey
options.desc: Pressing 'Tab' toggles the macro overlay when playing a level. With it enabled, your inputs will be automatically recorded in the background. Hence, turning this off could improve performance. Do not use any of the features in main level completions if you want it to count as legitimate!

options.name: Frame Advance (unstable)
options.desc: Adds frame stepping controls to the macro overlay. The issues related to frame stepping are very difficult to fix, so you should consider using speedhack and practice mode instead.

options.name: Input Display
options.desc: Shows a small D-Pad in the bottom right. Helps spotting when you're not holding a key.

options.name: Show UI While Recording
options.desc: Keeps the game UI visible in showcases. Off by default for clean footage, but you can use this regardless.

options.name: Player Info
options.desc: Shows the player's X/Y/angular velocity/coordinates in the bottom left while playing. Could be useful for precise movement.
